Meta.title: David Motorcycles — Gear & Parts
Meta.description: Adventure riding gear, parts and accessories for motorcycles and scooters. Helmets, jackets, gloves and more.

Footer.tagline: Gear and parts for motorcycles and scooters — the best prices in Israel.

Home.title: Riding Gear Built For The Road
Home.subtitle: Helmets, jackets, gloves, security and accessories — picked for real riders. David's boutique motorcycle gear store.
Home.helpBody: Talk to David — we help you pick the right gear for you and your bike.

Cta.waGeneric: Hi David, I'd like some details about your gear.
Cta.waProduct: Hi David, I'm interested in: {name}. Can you share details?

About.title: About David Motorcycles
body: A boutique store for motorcycle and scooter gear and parts — adventure, off-road and street riding.
We help riders choose the right gear at the best prices in Israel, with personal service at two locations: Tel Aviv and Tzur Hadassah.

Contact.title: Contact
Contact.subtitle: Call, message us on WhatsApp, or come visit.
Contact.waGeneric: Hi David, I'd like some details about your gear.
